name: TeslaMate
longDescription:
TeslaMate is a powerful, self-hosted data logger for Tesla vehicles. It collects driving, charging, and location data from the Tesla API and stores it in a PostgreSQL database for analysis and visualization.

Provides detailed statistics via Grafana dashboards: trip summaries, efficiency, charging sessions, battery health, and lifetime driving maps. Data can also be published to an MQTT broker for integration with Home Assistant.
description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla vehicle.
